rationale: Bug in unified spec runner's distinct hack logic; test runner infrastructure issue, not driver behavior.
Pure internal refactor of write concern error wrapping code; no spec behavior change.
BSON npm package ESM/browser packaging incompatibility; build/packaging issue.
Performance regression in find/create between v3 and v4; no spec rule violated.
fullResponse is a non-standard driver option not defined in CRUD spec; no specific spec rule violated.
BSON 4.5.0 breaks React Native due to util module resolution; packaging issue.
Internal code quality improvement: error message wording and template strings.
TypeScript generic type definitions buggy in v4.0; type system issue, not spec behavior.
findOne changed return from null to undefined when no result; ticket cites documentation requiring null.
Snappy 7.x incompatible API with 6.x; dependency upgrade for compression library.
Exception from invalid explain parameter can't be caught with useUnifiedTopology; internal error propagation bug.
AWS spec says token may be set but is silent on empty-string vs. undefined; user questions if fix violates spec.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1771; Improvement ticket to test against 5.0 servers; proactive rollout work.
API documentation website returning 404 for class pages; docs/hosting issue.
Driver rejects arbitrary explain levels; DRIVERS-1306 spec requires arbitrary levels be allowed.
Sync spec tests for AWS auth with temporary credentials in CSFLE; test infrastructure update.
Versioned API connection examples backported to 3.7; documentation work only.
AggregationCursor $out TypeScript type accepts number instead of string; TypeScript type bug.
UUID APIs marked internal; TypeScript visibility issue, not spec behavior.
Decimal128.fromString produces wrong binary for negative numbers like -0.0097; BSON spec violation.
insertMany missing errInfo.details from server validation errors; CRUD spec doesn't mandate this error field.
compressors option TypeScript type is array vs spec doc string; TypeScript definition mismatch.
v4.0+ regression: TLS certificate not presented to server; X.509 auth requires presenting client cert.
Collection.indexes() TypeScript return type is Document instead of Document[]; type definition bug.
GridFSBucketWriteStream TypeScript type incompatible with WritableStream; type definition issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1750; Improvement to use hello command; proactive spec-rollout, not a bug.
TLSSocketOptions missing from tls import in mongodb.d.ts; TypeScript type definition compilation error.
Convert mongodb-client-encryption to Node-API; internal library migration.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1875; sync BSON corpus tests and add subtype 7 constant per spec.
listDatabases TypeScript return types potentially incorrect; TypeScript type audit.
aggregate() generic type default assumes result matches collection type; TypeScript generics design issue.
BSON corpus test runner has wrong logic (scenario.string vs p.string); fixing test infrastructure.
mongodb@3.6.12 breaks Yarn v2 PnP due to optional-require package bug; packaging/dependency issue.
maxPoolSize changed from 10 to 100 between v3/v4; docs said 10 but code matches CMAP spec default of 100.
Convert kerberos to Node-API; internal build improvement.
bypassAutoEncryption:true should skip mongocryptd per CSFLE spec; driver still attempts to connect.
libmongocrypt install fails on CentOS 7 due to libc++ version mismatch; build/installation issue.
Adding spec tests for invalid relaxed UUIDs per DRIVERS-1526; test infrastructure addition.
Error message uses plural form for single invalid option; error message wording quality issue.
OptionalId type constraint fails in TypeScript 4.5-beta; TypeScript version compatibility issue.
Unified spec test failing on sharded clusters due to server bug SERVER-59924; test infrastructure tracking.
TypeError in mergeBatchResults on Timestamp comparison after server upgrade; internal implementation crash.
ObjectId constructor accepts array without throwing; BSON spec requires input validation.
Add TypeScript overloads for createCollection optional options; API ergonomics improvement.
Add overloads for BulkOperationBase.execute TypeScript types; API ergonomics improvement.
BSONTypeError/BSONError instanceof breaks when transpiled to older JS; JavaScript transpilation issue.
Callback called twice on error in insertOne; internal callback invocation bug, no spec rule violated.
InterruptableAsyncInterval can be starved; internal SDAM monitoring logic bug, no specific spec rule.
Online Archive query performance degradation; performance issue, no spec rule violated.
Allow TransactionOptions to accept string enum values; API ergonomics improvement, not spec compliance.
